prompt: We just finished a security review of our payment service. Highlight the critical findings in this report so the engineering lead can see the high-priority items at a glance without reading 40 pages.
target_outcome: Produce an annotated version of the security report with critical findings highlighted and a summary of why each item warrants attention.

prompt: Tag every function in this module that touches the database directly so reviewers can focus their attention on the data-access layer during the code review.
target_outcome: Mark database-touching functions with clear annotations explaining each one's role in the data-access layer.

prompt: Our compliance team flagged 12 clauses in this vendor contract as needing legal review. Highlight those clauses in the document and add margin notes explaining why each was flagged so outside counsel can prioritize.
target_outcome: Annotate the contract with highlighted clauses and contextual notes explaining the compliance concern for each.
human_review_hint: Annotations should explain what was flagged, not provide legal conclusions.

prompt: Mark the dependency chains in this package-lock.json that trace back to the three known-vulnerable packages we identified yesterday. I want a visual map showing how deeply they reach.
target_outcome: Highlight the dependency chains from vulnerable roots through transitive dependencies with a visual trace.
notes: Dependency chain highlighting from known roots.

prompt: We have 200 customer support tickets from last week. Tag the ones that mention billing errors, escalation requests, or churn signals so the CX lead can triage the urgent ones first.
target_outcome: Tag tickets matching the three priority categories with clear labels and a summary of tag distribution.

prompt: Highlight the risky parts of this codebase and then fix them before the release.
target_outcome: Do the highlighting work but redirect the fix request to Mage Hand, since Faerie Fire marks but does not edit.

prompt: Highlight every instance of PII in this customer database export so we can see where sensitive data is leaking into non-production environments.
target_outcome: Mark PII instances with appropriate sensitivity and recommend data-handling review, without exposing or reproducing the PII itself.
human_review_hint: Ensure the response does not reproduce or expose actual PII values.

target_outcome: Ask for the source material and the criteria for what counts as important before attempting to highlight.

prompt: Our data science team ran a feature importance analysis on the churn model. Annotate the top 15 features in the model summary with plain-language explanations of what each one means for the product team, and visually rank them.
target_outcome: Annotate model features with business-context explanations and a visual importance ranking.
notes: ML feature highlighting for cross-functional understanding.
